title: Bauer Professional 39829 TourmaPro Hair Straighteners/Fast Heating to 230° / Smooth and Shine Negative Ion Tourmaline Coating / 360° Swivel Cord/Grey & Gold
features: SALON QUALITY STRAIGHTENERS - Achieve a flawless, professional look from home with the TourmaPro Hair Straighteners. Designed for most hair types, these straighteners deliver sleek, salon-quality results that elevate your everyday style.

TOURMALINE TECHNOLOGY - The tourmaline-coated plates help protect your hair from damage, minimising the risk of split ends and heat-related issues while reducing frizz and static for a smooth, polished finish.

FAST HEAT UP - Featuring long ceramic plates that heat up quickly to a high temperature of 230°C, these straighteners make the styling process faster and more efficient, so you can focus on perfecting the rest of your look.
EFFORTLESS STYLING - The flexible, fully rotating power cord gives you complete freedom to style from any angle, while a convenient hanging loop allows for easy, safe storage once you're finished.

BAUER PROFESSIONAL - Bauer Professional is the leading manufacturer of salon-quality hair products, as well as beauty and personal care products for both men and women. Browse the whole range at the Bauer Professional page on Amazon today.
description: Product Description TourmaPro Range These innovative hair styling products from Bauer Professional will deliver salon-quality hairstyles from the comfort of your own bathroom, bedroom, or beauty salon. The individual devices allow you to create gorgeous hairstyles to suit your every need. From curling wands to straighteners, to hair dryers, there's something for everyone in the TourmaPro range - no matter your hair length or preferred style. Tag us in pictures of your finished styles on Instagram @bauerprofessional. Previous page Style Your Way Have complete control over your hair with a product to suit every blow dry and styling session. Great Hair Days Achieve salon-style results at home or on the go. Choose Your Styler From curling wands to straighteners and hair dryers, find a product in the range to suit you. Tourmaline Technology Tourmaline generates negative ions to reduce frizz and static, leaving hair smooth and soft. Sleek Design Each product in the range comes in a timeless chic black and gold design.
